summary: Iteration 17 - Price corrections verified. All requested features working: Monthly prices (Solo 49€, Croissance 199€, Flotte Pro 499€), Annual prices (Solo 470€/an, Croissance 1 900€/an, Flotte Pro 4 790€/an) with 'Soit environ X€ / mois' subtitle. Pain section text corrected to 'perdus pour votre trésorerie' (no 'pour votre pomme'). Hero has high-quality Unsplash truck image. All CTAs show '14 jours'. Backend API returns correct prices. Admin and driver dashboards working (regression passed).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified price corrections from user demand. Key prices: SOLO 49€/mois or 470€/an (39€/mois equiv), CROISSANCE 199€/mois or 1900€/an (158€/mois equiv), FLOTTE PRO 499€/mois or 4790€/an (399€/mois equiv).
